positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos
% SZS output start Proof for pos
1. ! [X0] : (listed(X0) => ~many_negative(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (rating_gt4(X0) => listed(X0)) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0] : (popular(X0) => rating_gt4(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. rating_gt4(hamden_subway) | popular(hamden_subway) [input(axiom)]
6. (provides_takeout(hamden_subway) & many_negative(hamden_subway)) => (rating_gt4(hamden_subway) & ~provides_takeout(hamden_subway)) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~((provides_takeout(hamden_subway) & many_negative(hamden_subway)) => (rating_gt4(hamden_subway) & ~provides_takeout(hamden_subway))) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ! [X0] : (~many_negative(X0) | ~listed(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
9. ! [X0] : (listed(X0) | ~rating_gt4(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
10. ! [X0] : (rating_gt4(X0) | ~popular(X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
11. (~rating_gt4(hamden_subway) | provides_takeout(hamden_subway)) & (provides_takeout(hamden_subway) & many_negative(hamden_subway)) [ennf transformation 7]
12. (~rating_gt4(hamden_subway) | provides_takeout(hamden_subway)) & provides_takeout(hamden_subway) & many_negative(hamden_subway) [flattening 11]
15. ~many_negative(X0) | ~listed(X0) [cnf transformation 8]
16. ~rating_gt4(X0) | listed(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
19. ~popular(X0) | rating_gt4(X0) [cnf transformation 10]
20. rating_gt4(hamden_subway) | popular(hamden_subway) [cnf transformation 5]
21. many_negative(hamden_subway) [cnf transformation 12]
25. 1 <=> popular(hamden_subway) [avatar definition]
27. popular(hamden_subway) <- (1) [avatar component clause 25]
29. 2 <=> rating_gt4(hamden_subway) [avatar definition]
30. ~rating_gt4(hamden_subway) <- (~2) [avatar component clause 29]
31. rating_gt4(hamden_subway) <- (2) [avatar component clause 29]
32. 1 | 2 [avatar split clause 20,29,25]
33. ~listed(hamden_subway) [resolution 15,21]
35. listed(hamden_subway) <- (2) [resolution 16,31]
36. $false <- (2) [forward subsumption resolution 35,33]
37. ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 36]
38. rating_gt4(hamden_subway) <- (1) [resolution 19,27]
39. $false <- (1, ~2) [forward subsumption resolution 38,30]
40. ~1 | 2 [avatar contradiction clause 39]
s1. 1 | 2 [sat_conversion 32]
s2. ~2 [sat_conversion 37]
s3. ~1 | 2 [sat_conversion 40]
s4. ~1 [rat s3,s2]
s5. # [rat s1,s2,s4]
41. $false [avatar sat refutation s5]
% SZS output end Proof for pos
% Termination reason: Refutation
